sns.policy.PolicyDocument.Description: A policy document that contains permissions to add to the specified SNS topics.

sns.policy.Topics.Description: The Amazon Resource Names (ARN) of the topics to which you want to add the policy. You can use the ` [Ref](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/intrinsic-function-reference-ref.html) ` function to specify an ` [AWS::SNS::Topic](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-sns-topic.html) ` resource.
